title: Hermes Context Compression Pipeline
brief: A flat technical infographic showing a 4-stage AI context compression pipeline. Stage 1: Prune old tool results (dedupe, strip screenshots, truncate JSON). Stage 2: Determine head/tail boundaries (protect system + first turns, reserve recent tail). Stage 3: Generate structured LLM summary (auxiliary model, handoff template). Stage 4: Reassemble message list (sanitize tool pairs, strip historical media). Use clear arrows, grouped modules, concise bilingual Chinese/English labels, soft professional palette.
prompt:
Create a polished article illustration titled 'Hermes Context Compression Pipeline'. Diagram type: architecture diagram. Use a flat technical infographic illustration, clean grouped modules, clear arrows, soft professional palette, concise bilingual labels, document-friendly composition. Make it suitable for insertion into engineering notes or a design document. Prefer a clear information hierarchy with section titles, concise Chinese/English labels, short notes, arrows, grouped modules, and strong readability. Avoid dense paragraph blocks. Language mode: zh-en. Target aspect ratio preset: doc-hd. Mode: text-only. Content brief:
A flat technical infographic showing a 4-stage AI context compression pipeline. Stage 1: Prune old tool results (dedupe, strip screenshots, truncate JSON). Stage 2: Determine head/tail boundaries (protect system + first turns, reserve recent tail). Stage 3: Generate structured LLM summary (auxiliary model, handoff template). Stage 4: Reassemble message list (sanitize tool pairs, strip historical media). Use clear arrows, grouped modules, concise bilingual Chinese/English labels, soft professional palette.
